title: bromus commutatus subsp. decipiens
intro: Bromus commutatus subsp. decipiens, commonly known as decipiens brome or lesser cheat, is a subspecies of grass within the genus Bromus. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly due to its content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bromus commutatus subsp. decipiens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
